task_completion.description: Navigate to the edit page for the Sony WH-1000XM5 product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the e-commerce admin interface (Drupal Commerce) with the product edit page open for 'Sony WH-1000XM5' (SKU: SONY-WH1000XM5).

task_completion.description: Update the price of the Sony WH-1000XM5 to $329.99 and save.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The price input field for the Sony product is set to '329.99', followed by a screenshot showing a success message indicating the product update was saved.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the edit page for the Logitech MX Master 3S product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the product edit page open for 'Logitech MX Master 3S' (SKU: LOGI-MXM3S).

task_completion.description: Update the price of the Logitech MX Master 3S to $79.99 and save.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The price input field for the Logitech product is set to '79.99', followed by a screenshot showing a success message indicating the product update was saved.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the edit page for the Bose QuietComfort 45 product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the product edit page open for 'Bose QuietComfort 45' (SKU: BOSE-QC45).

task_completion.description: Unpublish the Bose QuietComfort 45 product and save.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Published' checkbox or status toggle is unchecked/set to unpublished for the Bose product, followed by a screenshot showing a success message indicating the product update was saved.

task_completion.description: Verify the Bose QuietComfort 45 product was not deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The product catalog or admin product list still displays the 'Bose QuietComfort 45' (SKU: BOSE-QC45), but its status is indicated as 'Unpublished' or inactive.

integrity.description: The agent used the web-based admin GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the store's web interface in a browser. There should be no terminal windows open executing database commands (like SQL) or backend scripts (like drush) to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine e-commerce platform.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows the correct local or remote address for the store admin panel, not a local text editor or a mock HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent explicitly saved the changes using the interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Save' or 'Update' buttons on the product edit pages and triggers the platform's native success notifications, rather than just modifying DOM elements via browser developer tools.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires updating product details in a Drupal Commerce e-commerce backend. Sony WH-1000XM5 (SKU: SONY-WH1000XM5) target price is $329.99. Logitech MX Master 3S (SKU: LOGI-MXM3S) target price is $79.99. Bose QuietComfort 45 (SKU: BOSE-QC45) must be unpublished (status=0) but its original price (approx $329.00-$329.95) should remain unchanged and the product must NOT be deleted.
